scripts.dev: echo '🎮 Starting Daicer development environment...' && echo '  📍 Emulators: http://localhost:4000' && echo '  🔧 Backend: http://localhost:3001' && echo '  🎨 Studio: http://localhost:3002' && echo '  💻 Frontend: http://localhost:3000' && concurrently -n "emulators,backend,studio,frontend" -c "yellow,blue,magenta,green" "yarn dev:emulators" "yarn dev:backend" "yarn studio" "yarn dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:fresh: echo '🌱 Starting fresh environment with seed...' && echo '  📍 Emulators: http://localhost:4000' && echo '  🔧 Backend: http://localhost:3001' && echo '  🎨 Studio: http://localhost:3002' && echo '  💻 Frontend: http://localhost:3000' && yarn dev:emulators & sleep 5 && yarn seed && concurrently -n "backend,studio,frontend" -c "blue,magenta,green" "yarn dev:backend" "yarn studio" "yarn dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:emulators: echo '🔥 Starting Firebase emulators...' && firebase emulators:start --import=./emulator-data --export-on-exit=./emulator-data
scripts.build: echo '📦 Building all projects...' && yarn build:frontend && yarn build:backend && echo '✅ All builds complete!'
scripts.build:frontend: echo '📦 Building frontend...' && cd frontend && yarn build
scripts.build:backend: echo '📦 Building backend...' && cd backend && yarn build
scripts.start: echo '🌐 Starting production servers...' && concurrently -n "backend,frontend" -c "blue,green" "yarn start:backend" "yarn start:frontend"
scripts.preview: echo '👀 Starting frontend preview...' && cd frontend && yarn preview
scripts.seed: echo '🌱 Seeding database...' && yarn seed:gamedata && yarn seed:srd && yarn seed:spells && echo '✅ All data seeded!'
scripts.seed:gamedata: echo '🌱 Seeding game data...' && cd backend && FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:8080 FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:9099 yarn seed:gamedata
scripts.seed:srd: echo '📚 Seeding SRD rules...' && cd backend && FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:8080 FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:9099 yarn seed:srd
scripts.seed:spells: echo '🔮 Seeding spells...' && cd backend && FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:8080 FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:9099 yarn seed:spells
scripts.install:all: echo '📥 Installing all dependencies...' && yarn install && cd frontend && yarn install && cd ../backend && yarn install && echo '✅ All dependencies installed!'
scripts.emulators: echo '🔥 Starting Firebase emulators...' && firebase emulators:start --import=./emulator-data --export-on-exit=./emulator-data
scripts.kill:dev: echo '🛑 Killing dev environment (ports 3000, 3001, 8080, 9099, 4000)...' && lsof -ti:3000,3001,8080,9099,4000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || echo '✓ Dev ports clear'
scripts.kill:all: echo '🛑 Killing all dev and e2e processes...' && killall -9 node java 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti:3000,3001,3100,3101,8080,8081,9099,9100,9150,4000,4001,4401,4500 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || echo '✓ All ports clear'
scripts.docker:up: echo '🐳 Starting Docker containers...' && docker-compose up
scripts.docker:down: echo '🐳 Stopping Docker containers...' && docker-compose down
scripts.docker:build: echo '🐳 Building Docker images...' && docker-compose build
scripts.lint: echo '🔍 Linting all code...' && yarn lint:frontend && yarn lint:backend && echo '✅ All linting complete!'
scripts.lint:fix: echo '🔧 Fixing all linting issues...' && yarn lint:fix:frontend && yarn lint:fix:backend && echo '✅ All linting fixed!'
scripts.lint:check: echo '🔍 Checking lint (CI mode)...' && yarn lint:check:frontend && yarn lint:check:backend
scripts.lint:frontend: echo '🔍 Linting frontend...' && cd frontend && yarn lint
scripts.lint:backend: echo '🔍 Linting backend...' && cd backend && yarn lint
scripts.typecheck: echo '🔬 Type checking all code...' && yarn typecheck:frontend && yarn typecheck:backend && echo '✅ All type checks passed!'
scripts.typecheck:frontend: echo '  🔬 Frontend...' && cd frontend && yarn typecheck
scripts.typecheck:backend: echo '  🔬 Backend...' && cd backend && yarn typecheck
scripts.test: echo '🧪 Running all tests...' && yarn test:frontend && yarn test:backend && echo '✅ All tests passed!'
scripts.test:watch: echo '👀 Running all tests in watch mode...' && concurrently -n "frontend,backend" -c "green,blue" "yarn test:watch:frontend" "yarn test:watch:backend"
scripts.test:coverage: echo '📊 Running all tests with coverage...' && yarn test:coverage:backend && yarn test:coverage:frontend && tsx scripts/aggregate-coverage.ts && tsx scripts/update-coverage-badges.ts && echo '✅ Coverage reports generated!' && echo '  📊 Combined: coverage/index.html' && echo '  📊 Backend:  backend/coverage/index.html' && echo '  📊 Frontend: frontend/coverage/index.html'
scripts.test:coverage:frontend: echo '  📊 Frontend coverage...' && cd frontend && yarn test:coverage
scripts.test:coverage:backend: echo '  📊 Backend coverage...' && cd backend && yarn test:coverage
scripts.test:ci: echo '🤖 Running tests (CI mode)...' && yarn test:ci:frontend && yarn test:ci:backend
scripts.test:ui: echo '🎨 Starting Vitest UI (frontend only)...' && cd frontend && yarn test:ui
scripts.test:e2e: echo '🎭 Running E2E integration tests...' && cd e2e && yarn test
scripts.test:e2e:ui: echo '🎭 Running E2E tests in UI mode...' && cd e2e && yarn test:ui
scripts.test:e2e:headed: echo '🎭 Running E2E tests (headed)...' && cd e2e && yarn test:headed
scripts.test:e2e:debug: echo '🔍 Debugging E2E tests...' && cd e2e && yarn test:debug
scripts.test:e2e:report: echo '📊 Opening E2E test report...' && cd e2e && yarn report
scripts.storybook: echo '📚 Starting Storybook component library...' && echo '  📍 http://localhost:6006' && cd frontend && yarn storybook
scripts.storybook:build: echo '📦 Building Storybook...' && cd frontend && yarn storybook:build
scripts.storybook:preview: echo '👀 Serving built Storybook...' && cd frontend && yarn storybook:preview
scripts.qa: bash -c 'LOG_FILE="logs/qa-$(date +%Y-%m-%d-%H%M%S).log"; echo "🎯 QA Check Started: $(date)" | tee "$LOG_FILE"; echo "" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "  Step 1/5: ✨ Checking Formatting" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; yarn format:check 2>&1 | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "  Step 2/5: 🔬 Type Checking" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; yarn typecheck 2>&1 | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "  Step 3/5: 🔧 Linting Code" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; yarn lint 2>&1 | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "  Step 4/5: 🧪 Running Tests" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; yarn test:coverage 2>&1 | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "  Step 5/5: 🎭 Running E2E Tests (Headless)" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; yarn e2e 2>&1 | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "✅ QA CHECK COMPLETE!" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "📊 Coverage Reports:" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "   Frontend: frontend/coverage/index.html" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "   Backend:  backend/coverage/index.html" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "📝 Full log saved to: $LOG_FILE" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo ""'
scripts.fix: bash -c 'LOG_FILE="logs/fix-$(date +%Y-%m-%d-%H%M%S).log"; echo "🔧 Auto-Fix Started: $(date)" | tee "$LOG_FILE"; echo "" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "  Step 1/2: ✨ Formatting Code" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; yarn format 2>&1 | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "✅ Formatting complete!" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "  Step 2/2: 🔧 Fixing Linting Issues" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; yarn lint:fix 2>&1 | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "✅ AUTO-FIX COMPLETE!" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "💡 Run \`yarn qa\` to verify all checks pass" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo "📝 Full log saved to: $LOG_FILE" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; echo ""'
scripts.ci: echo '🤖 Running CI checks...' && yarn format:check && yarn lint:check && yarn typecheck && yarn test:ci
scripts.qa:frontend: echo '🎯 Running frontend QA...' && cd frontend && yarn format && yarn lint:fix && yarn typecheck && yarn test:coverage && echo '✅ Frontend QA complete!'
scripts.qa:backend: echo '🎯 Running backend QA...' && cd backend && yarn format && yarn lint:fix && yarn typecheck && yarn test:coverage && echo '✅ Backend QA complete!'
scripts.infra:install: echo '📥 Installing infra dependencies...' && cd infra && yarn install
scripts.infra:synth: echo '🏗️  Synthesizing Terraform config...' && cd infra && yarn synth
scripts.infra:diff: echo '🔍 Showing infrastructure diff...' && cd infra && yarn diff
scripts.infra:deploy: echo '🚀 Deploying infrastructure to GCP...' && cd infra && yarn deploy
scripts.infra:destroy: echo '💥 Destroying infrastructure...' && cd infra && yarn destroy
scripts.deploy:backend: echo '🐳 Building & pushing backend image...' && docker build -f backend/Dockerfile -t gcr.io/${GCP_PROJECT_ID:-daicer-ed373}/daicer-backend:latest . && docker push gcr.io/${GCP_PROJECT_ID:-daicer-ed373}/daicer-backend:latest
scripts.deploy:frontend: echo '🔥 Deploying frontend to Firebase Hosting...' && cd frontend && yarn build && firebase deploy --only hosting --project ${GCP_PROJECT_ID:-daicer-ed373}
scripts.deploy:all: echo '🚀 Full deployment pipeline...' && yarn deploy:backend && yarn deploy:infra && yarn deploy:frontend && echo '✅ Deployment complete!'
